name: Grilled Bacon Wrap Shrimp Stuffed w/ Asadero Cheese & Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp.
2. Slice along the backside of each shrimp as far down as possible without it falling apart.
3. Lay the shrimp flat on their backs.
4. Separate the Asadero cheese into two slices, then cut into 1/4-inch rectangles.
5. Place a piece of cheese and a basil leaf in the middle of each shrimp.
6. Fold over the shrimp to enclose the filling.
7. Wrap each shrimp securely with a strip of bacon, overlapping the wraps. Secure with a toothpick.
8. Grill on a hot grill until the bacon is cooked through. Alternatively, pan broil if grilling is not possible.
